title: Visual Jukebox
description: Shows the disc of jukeboxes, with a rotation animation and static option with insert/eject animation. Server-side for fabric
body:
# This mod will no longer be updated on modrinth!
# See https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/visual-jukebox for the latest version!

This is a server-side mod that renders the disc item that is currently in a jukebox on top of the jukebox, either animated rotating, or statically sitting in the slot with an insert/eject animation for more immersiveness.

Clients don't need to have this mod installed.

Requires the Polymer library

---

Rotation option:
